content:
SHELL=/bin/bash
PYTHON_SHA256=07ab697474595e06f06647417d3c7fa97ded07afc1a7e4454c5639919b46eaea
PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1
TERM_PROGRAM_VERSION=3.3a
TMUX=/tmp/tmux-0/default,94,0
HOSTNAME=f6f18bd1550e
PYTHON_VERSION=3.12.10
EDITOR=code
PWD=/workspace
VSCODE_PORT=-1
GSETTINGS_SCHEMA_DIR=/openhands/micromamba/envs/openhands/share/glib-2.0/schemas
CONDA_PREFIX=/openhands/micromamba/envs/openhands
MAMBA_ROOT_PREFIX=/openhands/micromamba
GSETTINGS_SCHEMA_DIR_CONDA_BACKUP=
PIP_BREAK_SYSTEM_PACKAGES=1
HOME=/root
LANG=C.UTF-8
port=13154
VIRTUAL_ENV=/openhands/poetry/openhands-ai-5O4_aCHf-py3.12
GPG_KEY=7169605F62C751356D054A26A821E680E5FA6305
PROMPT_COMMAND=export PS1="
###PS1JSON###
{
  \"pid\": \"$!\",
  \"exit_code\": \"$?\",
  \"username\": \"\\u\",
  \"hostname\": \"\\h\",
  \"working_dir\": \"$(pwd)\",
  \"py_interpreter_path\": \"$(which python 2>/dev/null || echo \\"\\")\"
}
###PS1END###
"
OH_INTERPRETER_PATH=/openhands/poetry/openhands-ai-5O4_aCHf-py3.12/bin/python
MAMBA_EXE=/openhands/micromamba/bin/micromamba
TERM=tmux-256color
POETRY_VIRTUALENVS_PATH=/openhands/poetry
OPENVSCODE_SERVER_ROOT=/openhands/.openvscode-server
SDL_AUDIODRIVER=dsp
TMUX_PANE=%1
CONDA_SHLVL=1
VISUAL=code
SHLVL=1
GIT_EDITOR=code --wait
PS2=
PS1=
###PS1JSON###
{
  "pid": "",
  "exit_code": "0",
  "username": "\u",
  "hostname": "\h",
  "working_dir": "/workspace",
  "py_interpreter_path": "/openhands/poetry/openhands-ai-5O4_aCHf-py3.12/bin/python"
}
###PS1END###

CONDA_DEFAULT_ENV=openhands
PYGAME_HIDE_SUPPORT_PROMPT=hide
LC_ALL=C.UTF-8
POETRY_HOME=/usr/local
PATH=/openhands/poetry/openhands-ai-5O4_aCHf-py3.12/bin:/openhands/micromamba/envs/openhands/bin:/openhands/micromamba/condabin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin
TIKTOKEN_CACHE_DIR=/openhands/poetry/openhands-ai-5O4_aCHf-py3.12/lib/python3.12/site-packages/litellm/litellm_core_utils/tokenizers
MAIL=/var/mail/root
TERM_PROGRAM=tmux
_=/usr/bin/env
